narrative:
Adams Twp township has 858 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.6 percentage points.
